calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-17-2021 Off Calendar

Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Nov-20-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances via Courtcall:
Kyle Schriner, Esq., 415-321-4924, appearing for FuelX Inc., Plaintiff
John Kreis, Esq., 213-613-1049, appearing for Forus Inc., for Defendant

ARGUED. Mr. Schriner stated that he contested the tentative ruling and presented oral arugment in support of his postion. Mr. Kreis provided case background.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF FUELX INC. Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment. Plaintiff to recover all past due rent for the through delivery of posession and accured amounts under the contract through November, subject to the payment received under the Letter of Credit.Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC3.1312(b). Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)

Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Nov-16-2020 Continued To Nov-20-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances by any attorney, any party or any interested party.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF FUELX INC. Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment is continued to November 20, 2020. By no later than November 18, 2020 moving party to provide citations to cases where an attachment was granted for the balance of the lease for real property upon tenant surrendering possession. The brief shall only include case names and citations. No argument. Further Plaintiff may provide competent admissible evidence re: mitigation efforts for the months of September, October and November 2020 by no later than November 18, 2020. Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)

Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Nov-10-2020 Continued To Nov-16-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances by any attorney, any party or any interested party.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF FUELX INC.'S Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment is continued to November 16, 2020 for Plaintiff to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide a courtesy copy of the moving papers to department 501 no later than November 10, 2020 by 4:00 p.m. with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. The Court received courtesy copies of opposition and reply. Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)
